notes: These are the 4 tools configured in the VAPI assistant. Create each one in VAPI Dashboard > Tools, then attach all to the assistant under the Tools tab. Replace YOUR_NGROK_URL with your actual ngrok URL e.g. https://eve-brainlike-yoshie.ngrok-free.dev

tools.name: checkAvailability
tools.description: Check available appointment slots for a given date. Always call this before booking.

date.description: The appointment date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

tools.name: bookAppointment
tools.description: Book a new dental appointment after confirming availability.

reason.description: Reason for visit e.g. routine checkup, toothache, cleaning.

dentist.description: Preferred dentist name. Leave empty to auto-assign first available.

tools.name: updateAppointment
tools.description: Reschedule or cancel an existing appointment.

action.description: Action to perform: reschedule, cancel, or changeDentist.

newDate.description: New appointment date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Required when action is reschedule.

newTime.description: New appointment time e.g. 11:00 AM. Required when action is reschedule.

newDentist.description: Name of the dentist to switch to. Required when action is changeDentist.

tools.name: transfer_call_tool
tools.description: Use this tool to transfer the call to a staff member when the patient asks to speak with a real person, describes a dental emergency, becomes distressed or the assistant is unable to resolve their request after a couple of attempts.
